urdu transliteration text:
AAJ RUKHSAT HORAHI HAI TUMSEY ZEHRA YA ALI
Aaj rukhsat horahi hai tumsey zehra ya ali
english translation text: Zahra is bidding you farewell today you O Ali

urdu transliteration text: KYA KAHOO DIL MEY KHAYAAL AATEY HAI KYA KYA YA ALI
english translation text: What should I say about the thoughts that are coming to me O Ali?

urdu transliteration text: HA MADEENEY WAALO KO THA MERA RONA NAA GAWAAR
english translation text: The people of Madina disapproved of my crying

urdu transliteration text: AAJ SE HOGA NA IN LOGO KO SHIKWA YA ALI
english translation text: From today, they will not complain to you O Ali.

urdu transliteration text: DUSHMANO KO TUM NA AANEY DENA MERI LAASH PAR
english translation text: Do not let my enemies come to my funeral

urdu transliteration text: PARDA E SHAB MEY MERI MAYYAT UTHAANA YA ALI
english translation text: Carry my coffin in the veils of the darkness O Ali

urdu transliteration text: BAAD MEREY JAANEY KYA HO HAAL BACHO KA MERE
english translation text: What will be the state of my children after me?

urdu transliteration text: UNKO EEZA HO TO HOGI MUJHKO EEZA YA ALI
english translation text: Anything that hurts them will hurt me O Ali.

urdu transliteration text: FAAQEY KARKEY AAFATO SE MY NEY PAALA HAI INHEY
english translation text: I have nurtured them with great difficulty

urdu transliteration text: TUM KHAYAAL INKA MERI KHAATIR SE RAKHNA YA ALI
english translation text: For my sake, please take care of them dearly O Ali

urdu transliteration text: JAANTEY HAI AAP YE NAAZO KA PAALA HAI HUSAIN
english translation text: You know that I have brought up Hussain (AS) with great care and love

urdu transliteration text: WO AGAR ROYE DILAASA ISKO DENA YA ALI
english translation text: If he cries please console him O Ali

urdu transliteration text: TUMKO ZEHMAT HOGI LEKIN MERI TASKEE'N KE LIYE
english translation text: It will be hard for you but for my comfort

urdu transliteration text: MERI TURBAT PAR MEREY BACHO KO LAANA YA ALI
english translation text: Please bring my children to my grave O Ali

urdu transliteration text:
REHGAYE APNAA KALEYJA THAAMKAR MAULA "SAEED"
O Saeed (name of poet) , Imam Ali stayed strong although heartbroken

BOLI ZEHRA JAB KHUDAA HAAFIZ TUMHAARA YA ALI
When Bibi Zahra said Khuda hafiz O Ali
